screening_criteria._comment: Pure CANSLIM: keep core growth thresholds canonical, and use quality filters as support rather than SEPA-style tightening.

leadership_criteria._comment: Pure CANSLIM still wants leadership, but not every SEPA chart-quality overlay.

supply_demand_criteria._comment: Use O'Neil-style accumulation confirmation without forcing the stricter SEPA 50/200 volume expansion.

institutional_criteria._comment: CANSLIM I: require at least some sponsorship, but reject over-owned names.

pattern_criteria._comment: Pure CANSLIM should explicitly restore N: either near/new highs with a real pivot setup or a valid breakout.

market_data._comment: Institutional sponsorship can come from yfinance info fallback or optional SEC 13F enrichment.
